x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Creation Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to establish and record a new position resulting from a transaction or agreement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Update Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to modify an existing position due to changes in quantity, ownership, or attributes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Valuation Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to calculate and update the financial value of a position (e.g., market value, PnL).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Reconciliation Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to compare and align positions across systems, accounts, or counterparties to ensure consistency.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Transfer Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to move a position between accounts, portfolios, or entities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Adjustment Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to correct or amend position records due to errors, corporate actions, or reclassifications.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Aggregation Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to consolidate multiple positions for reporting, risk, or analysis purposes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Reporting Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to generate reports on positions, including holdings, exposures, and performance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Position Tracking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to update or monitor positions only when predefined conditions are met (e.g., price thresholds, risk limits).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Position Closure Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to close or remove a position when it is fully settled or no longer active.
